text.title: storybook-setup Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for storybook-setup as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using @storybook/react framework adapter for Next.js App Router instead of @storybook/nextjs.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without @storybook/nextjs, useRouter returns null in stories, causing every story that imports a link component to throw.

failure-mode.description: Adding duplicate addons entries in main.ts from multi-pass agent edits.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Duplicate addon entries cause addon panels to be empty; Storybook starts but the controls/a11y/actions tabs are invisible.
